programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Puentes ardientes
programme.desc: Danny y Baez tienen nuevos compañeros temporales. Jamie y Eddie planean robar la placa de un detective. Frank habla sobre igualdad y compromete su relación con la Arquidiócesis.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Perdonar y olvidar
programme.desc: Jamie defiende a un oficial acosado por testificar contra su pareja. Erin descubre que su amante podría ser su jefe en la fiscalía. Danny pide a Erin que acuse de asesinato a un hombre que disparó a una niña de 15 años que murió 8 años después.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que está desfigurando víctimas a propósito. Además, Rossi tiene un encuentro incómodo con su exesposa, Hayden Montgomery, quien mantuvo a su hija, Joy, en secreto durante casi 30 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los guardias de la prisión en Virginia interceptan un paquete de pruebas relacionadas con el secuestro de dos niños hace varios años, la UAC interroga a un famoso asesino serial que puede tener información sobre el paradero de los niños.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se sorprende cuando Hotch es arrestado por un equipo SWAT y por sospecha de conspiración, mientras el equipo se apresura a demostrar su inocencia, sospechan que se avecina un complot mayor.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Habladora
programme.desc: Jamie es atacado por un matón vengativo después de intervenir en su relación abusiva con su novia. Frank enfrenta un escándalo político por comentarios insensibles de Henry que fueron grabados ilegalmente y filtrados a la prensa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El más buscado
programme.desc: Frank y Danny buscan encarcelar a un delincuente internacional que siempre se libra de cargos por asesinato, pero les falta evidencia para una condena. Erin considera dejar su trabajo para ejercer en la práctica privada.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood search ends with the suspect in a stranger's home, a pastor calls about a suspicious car parked behind his church, and a deputy gives advice to a young mother.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quarreling couple attracts their neighbors' attention, and a disoriented driver blames his freak accident on bad weather.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.desc: A first-time offender brings officers on an intense car chase, deputies respond to an armed robbery, and a routine traffic stop ends in multiple arrests.

programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies respond to an armed carjacking, an altercation leads to a woman's arrest, and officers face a combative man.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs arrive at their favorite diner only to discover a gruesome crime scene with eight dead victims and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a girl is shot and killed at a large rave in the desert, the CSI team has to search for clues, find her missing friend and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a famed music historian is murdered and left in a piano, it has an emotional effect on Sanders, who had a past with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a K-9 is blamed for the death of his partner, the CSI team discovers there's more to the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Things get personal when D.B. Russell is drawn into the investigation of the death of his son's basketball coach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Russell y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos, uno de los suyos se enfrenta al peligro en una arriesgada misión encubierta para acercarse al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se apresura a encontrar a Morgan y a Ellie Brass después de su secuestro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar un asesinato y un robo en un juego de póquer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un incendio en un concierto musical.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga un programa de cocina en vivo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows regresa para ayudar a los miembros de CSI a resolver un caso antiguo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un indigente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga a un desconocido que aparece muerto después de lluvias torrenciales en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar a un hombre que apareció muerto dentro de una bola para hámster de tamaño para humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar el apuñalamiento de una pareja.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team delve into the world of celebrity and investigate the murder of a paparazzi. He discovers the victim witnessed another murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Asesinan a una leyenda del deporte y la investigación se complica cuando el laboratorio pierde el cuerpo. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Acontecimientos extraños empiezan a afectar al equipo de CSI mientras persiguen a un asesino en serie que atacó durante un eclipse total de sol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una modelo se electrocuta en la pasarela, el caso lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI de vuelta al hijo de Horatio y a su archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando unas vacaciones familiares se vuelven mortales, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que los supervivientes hagan justicia por mano propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un atentado contra la vida de Calleigh pone en peligro su vida personal y profesional. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El estilo de vida de los ricos y famosos está bajo el microscopio de Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la niñera de una familia adinerada aparece muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una ametralladora rara e ilegal evapora a tres contrabandistas de armas, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que el arma cause más muertes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La ex de Horatio, y madre de Kyle, resurge en Miami como la viuda de un multimillonario que hará cualquier cosa para recuperar a su hijo.

programme.desc: El joven capitán de un grupo conocido como los rurales es perseguido por el gobierno mexicano por defender los derechos de los campesinos de las injusticias, pero en esta odisea contará con el apoyo del pueblo.

programme.title: La vida no vale nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: Por ellas, aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un aristócrata arruinado casa a su hija con un rico ranchero para no caer en la pobreza, sin saber que este es más astuto que ellos y los pone a trabajar duro en el campo.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Perdita Durango
programme.desc: A psychotic couple’s crime spree grows shockingly violent as they kidnap and rape a random teenage couple and then prepare them for human sacrifice.

programme.title: Insectos
programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.title: Jugadores
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar, Matt Damon y Edward Norton, protagonizan Rounders. Un exadicto a las apuestas regresa a las mesas en una apuesta de vida o muerte para rescatar a su amigo.

programme.title: La Trampa
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar, Adrien Brody, Antonio Banderas y John Malkovich protagonizan esta atrapante y explosiva historia policial sobre tres criminales atrapados en un depósito tras un asalto.

programme.title: Destrucción
programme.desc: Una detective de policía reconecta con gente relacionada con una misión encubierta de hace años para encontrar paz.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Pena de muerte
programme.desc: Ganadora del Oscar, Susan Sarandon interpreta a la hermana Helen Prejean. Una mujer espiritual quien se embarca en la peligrosa misión de salvar a un joven condenado a la pena de muerte.

programme.title: El pequeño Tate
programme.desc: Jodie Foster protagoniza junto con Dianne Wiest, este drama que afirma la vida sobre una madre soltera y su hijo, un niño prodigio que se siente aislado, perdido y solo, hasta que Dede se da cuenta de lo que Fred ha necesitado todo el tiempo.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Frida (ESP)
programme.desc: Salma Hayek triunfa en esta película biográfica de una mujer excepcional que vivió una vida inolvidable, Frida Kahlo. Está dirigida por Julie Taymor y cuenta con un elenco de apoyo que incluye a Alfred Molina, Antonio Banderas y Diego Luna.

programme.title: En el tiempo de las mariposas
programme.desc: En el tiempo de las mariposas es una novela de la escritora dominicana Julia Álvarez, publicada en 1994, sobre la historia de las hermanas Mirabal.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: El hombre sin pasado
programme.desc: Un tranquilo cuidador en una casa de empeño, con un pasado violento, se enfrenta a una red de tráfico de drogas y órganos con la esperanza de salvar a una niña que es su única amiga.

programme.title: Elefante blanco
programme.desc: Un asesino es contratado por un hombre de negocios para vengar el asesinato de su hija por parte de traficantes de esclavos blancos en Tailandia.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: The Tunnel
programme.desc: Un camión cisterna choca dentro de un túnel en Noruega, dejando atrapada a la gente dentro del mismo. Se desata una fuerte tormenta de nieve, impidiendo que el principal equipo de rescate llegue a lugar.

programme.title: Yo, el halcón
programme.desc: Un título de campeón, un gran premio en metálico y el amor de su hijo: el premio más grande de todos, corren peligro cuando Hawk se enfrenta a su mayor enemigo por todo lo que siempre ha querido.

programme.title: El templo del oro
programme.desc: Dos mercenarios con mala suerte (Chuck Norris y Louis Gossett Jr.) conocen a una hermosa chica (Melody Anderson) con un mapa de una mina de oro perdida y deciden intentar hacerse ricos. ¡Pero el camino hacia el tesoro no es cosa fácil!

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Lo imposible
programme.desc: Nominada al Oscar (Mejor Actriz, Naomi Watts), este apasionante drama cuenta la increíble historia real de la supervivencia de una familia frente a probabilidades imposibles.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El torpe Inspector Clouseau (Steve Martin) se encarga de investigar el asesinato de un famoso entrenador de fútbol y el robo del diamante Pantera Rosa, de inestimable valor. Él y su compañero Gilbert Ponton (Jean Reno) van de calamidad en calamidad.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa 2
programme.desc: Steve Martin vuelve a divertirnos encarnando al torpe Inspector Jacques Clouseau. Esta vez debe descubrir quién ha robado la Pantera Rosa, un diamante de valor inestimable, y otros tesoros del mundo. Coprotagonizada por Jean Reno y John Cleese.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de Lecter Corp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Estrenando cuerpo
programme.desc: El cómico en aprietos Lance Barton sabe cómo es morir en escena. Pero cuando su vida toma un giro inesperado, directo al cielo, Lance está seguro de que ha habido un error.

programme.title: El chico de oro
programme.desc: Como “El Elegido”, Murphy está en una alocada misión para salvar al Chico de oro, un joven con místicos poderes quien ha sido abducido por un culto maligno.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Desierto adentro
programme.desc: Elías ha cometido un gran pecado contra Dios y está convencido de que la condena de una muerte prematura caerá sobre sus hijos. Queriendo detener el terrible castigo, dedicará su vida a construir una iglesia.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Agujetas para Navidad
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Jennifer la fuerza a ser voluntaria en un refugio para enseñarle compasión y responsabilidad, ella crea un impensado lazo con el equipo, y un pequeño y especial invitado que la hará comprender el verdadero significado de la Navidad.

programme.title: Un novio para Navidad
programme.desc: Cuando el plan de Ashley de reconectar con un exnovio en Navidad fracasa, su mejor amigo Liam y ella deciden fingir un romance. Mientras que sus sentimientos comienzan a volverse reales, Ashley tendrá que decidir lo que su corazón en verdad quiere.

programme.title: El vuelo antes de Navidad
programme.desc: Dos extraños que por casualidad trabajan en marketing comparten una habitación en un bed and breakfast cuando una tormenta de nieve retrasa su vuelo en Montana la víspera de Navidad.

programme.title: Una Navidad real sobre hielo
programme.desc: Un príncipe llega al norte del estado de Nueva York para establecer una empresa y se enamora de una ex patinadora olímpica.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: La tierna historia de la infancia de Jesucristo, desde la Anunciación, la Natividad, la Visita de los Tres Reyes Magos, la Matanza de los Inocentes ordenada por el Rey Herodes y la Huida de la Sagrada Familia a Egipto.

programme.title: Agujetas para Navidad

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: Tú eres el próximo
programme.desc: La reunión familiar de los Davis se tuerce cuando su casa es asediada por un equipo de asaltantes con máscaras y ballestas.

programme.title: La conspiración del diablo
programme.desc: Un culto satánico roba la Sábana Santa de Turín para fines malvados.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Stephen King: la bala de plata
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, Marty Coslaw, y su tío para liberar la ciudad de su bestial amenaza.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Buffalo Girls
programme.desc: Based on Larry McMurtry's best-selling novel which celebrates the bold escapades of Calamity Jane and her illustrious cohorts, as they travel the wild west in search of her long-lost daughter and the west they once knew.

programme.desc: Based on Larry McMurtry's best-selling novel which celebrates the bold escapades of Calamity Jane and her illustrious cohorts, as they travel the wild west in search of her long-lost daughter and the west they once knew.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.desc: In this provocatively daring film, an attention-seeking schoolgirl vengefully spreads rumors that her teachers (Audrey Hepburn and Shirley MacLaine) are lesbians.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are haunted by the ghost of his first wife.

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1945)
programme.desc: Meeting a stranger in a railway station, a woman is tempted to cheat on her husband.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike tries to learn Spanish by sleeping with a Spanish tape playing under his pillow. When he goes on a trip, Steve sleeps in Mike's bed since his own room is being painted. The auto timed recorder plays; Steve talks Spanish in the morning.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) is assigned the new glamour girl (Judi Sherven) as his study partner. He finds there's more to a study partner than good looks.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip's school assignment is to write a paper about his mother. Since his mother is dead, he decides to write about Bub, the closest thing he has to a mother.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike is placed in charge of taking care of the house and his brothers when both Steve and Bub are out of town at the same time. He finds it a challenge, especially when Robbie and his friend go to the hospital after a school accident.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When the boys continue to ask Bub for help with their homework, he realizes he does not have all the answers. He decides to go to night school for further education. He meets another student, and they both make up stories about their lives.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip runs away from home after feeling neglected, but when he gets downtown, he realizes home is safer.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While on a camping trip vacation without the other family members, Steve is matched to another camper by an older couple who loves to play matchmakers. Both Steve and Fran are initially reluctant.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Four attractive flight attendants move into the Pearson's house, and while Bub and the boys befriend them right away, Steve is annoyed by all the noise from a party for their pilot friends.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub wants to do something different than dishes and dusting. He goes on interviews for different jobs.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is on the mend after a gunshot and is given a routine assignment by his Intertect boss. When he goes into a small town to do this, Mannix finds a mystery there.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's routine child custody case becomes complicated when it turns out the child's father is the target of killers.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A burglar steals notebooks from a psychiatrist, then double crosses his accomplice and takes the notebooks for himself. One of the patients hire Intertect after being blackmailed.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A newspaper is preparing an expose but the man holding the documentation for it flees as the story went to press. The newspaper hires Intertect and Mannix to investigate the case.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Intertect is retained by the police department to help transport an informant to safety. However, the case soon turns out to be more complicated - and very deadly.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer ends up working with a witness to their crime.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Michael Stone and Inspector Steven Keller investigate the murder of women. The murderer was wearing an officer's uniform of the United States Air Force.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A single .25 caliber pistol affects many lives in a single weekend.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett finds himself caught in the crossfire as a faction of embattled Hawaiian natives take on the Island's underworld. The prize -- control of a labor union and the 50th state's rich tourist business.

programme.desc: Honolulu policewoman Lori Wilson is on the scene when her husband, Honolulu cop and Five-O recruit, Kevin Wilson, is gunned down by bandits. McGarrett brings Five-O into the search for Wilson's killer.

programme.desc: Richard Kimble knows negligence caused the death of a salvage diver and he jeopardizes his own life when he befriends the girl accused of being a jinx.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pura suerte
programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Before the final Cab Ceremony, Pauly and Vinny's moms drop by to meet the remaining ladies, and the guys decide who they want to ask for a shot at love.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti is not in paradise with two tough clients from The Bachelor: Vinny Ventiera, a cliff diver who falls too hard too fast, and Daniel Maguire, a judgmental narcissist with absurd expectations.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti matches wits with Devina Kaur, a sex-obsessed author who challenges her at every turn, and Peter Curti, a gay millennial entrepreneur searching for his first real relationship.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti Stanger goes head to head with mouthy Basketball Wives LA star Laura Govan and her shocking behavior and a perfectionist who only wants a "picture perfect" woman.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti has her work cut out for her when two high-intensity lawyers check-in. David Goldman, the epic ageist, and Rhonda Wills, a red carpet snob, force Patti to pull out all the stops to try to find them, love.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti clashes with poker player, Jason Karniol who has yet to play his cards right in his dating life. Wedding planner Kacy McInturff hopes her quest for love at the Millionaire's Club goes off without a hitch!

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Shawn Isaac, a former politician and current rapper who judges women based on their resume, and 90's rap icon, Monie Love, who micromanages her men into man babies arrive! Will Patti find these two rappers love?

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.desc: The Silurian's infect Major Baker with a virus and release him to spread the infection.

programme.desc: An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a shiba inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Expert Cesar Millan rehabilitates dogs with behavioral issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los ochenta, las importaciones de cocaína en Florida estaban entre las más altas del país. El homicidio y la intimidación se impusieron en los territorios.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Kokomo, Indiana, un crimen impensable aterrorizó a los residentes. Una mujer fue secuestrada de su casa una clara mañana de primavera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1997, un triple homicidio aterrorizó a los residentes de la capital del país. En un café en Georgetown, tres empleados fueron asesinados por disparos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Langley, Virginia, un terrorista dispara un arma al tráfico en hora pico. Las víctimas parecían elegidas al azar, pero el motivo podría ser político y apunta a los empleados de la Agencia Central de Inteligencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la Texas rural, una niña de trece años es secuestrada de camino a la escuela. Desesperado por encontrarla a salvo, su padre millonario contacta a las autoridades locales y al FBI.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En septiembre de 1997, un equipo de hombres cubiertos con máscaras asaltó una instalación de autos blindados en Los Ángeles, y escaparon con 18,9 millones de dólares, el mayor golpe en la historia de robos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and run away to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with the fallout of their elopement and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Heidi crashes Laurens surprise birthday party, the two old friends cry about their disintegrated friendship. Spencer starts a violent fistfight when Cameron accuses him of picking up a bartender.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La situación de Talía e Igor no estaría siendo la mejor. No hablar con Arantxa la lleva a quedar expuesta porque la española toma la iniciativa y le dice sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Kyle y Chloe de Geordie Shore llegan a Súper Shore y hacen historia al llegar a la casa de sorpresa para pasar unos días con los chicos. Los Ingleses muestran por qué son tan respetados y agarran fiesta muy duro.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Arantxa se convierte en el acontecimiento del verano. Las sorpresas y las celebraciones se prolongan durante varios días de divertidísimas fiestas.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene que terminar y así pasa con estas vacaciones en las costas del mediterráneo. Llega la hora en que los chicos de Súper Shore deberán de despedirse.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos repasan los mejores momentos de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Ellos verán las mejores fiestas, las peleas, los momentos más importantes de sus vacaciones y lo que eso conlleva

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuevas vacaciones comienzan para la familia más disfuncional. Serán en Rimini, Italia la tierra de la matadora de Italia, Elettra.El primer episodio sorprende a los Shores con muchos cambios dentro de la familia y con una casa espectacular.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo parece indicar que el desmadre este año lo empiezan a poner los nuevos discípulos. Victor trata de seducir a Elettra, Isaac juega con Adela para ver quien tiene el control y Ferre tontea todo el tiempo seduciendo a Eva hasta que se pelean.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Young Brian Martell is accused of murdering a famous playwright – just as his father was charged with murdering the playwright’s father forty years ago! In untangling a web of secrets and adultery, Matlock and his father uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Young Brian Martell is accused of murdering a famous playwright – just as his father was charged with murdering the playwright’s father forty years ago! In untangling a web of secrets and adultery, Matlock and his father uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a member of the Law Club disappears, it becomes apparent that each of the students in Matlock's law class had a motive. Matlock wonders if he taught someone how to commit the perfect crime, and sets out to discover if it really was.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An old friend of Matlock has been accused of murdering his cheating partner, but when Matlock finds out that others were also the targets of her swindles, the list of suspects grows

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
